<div data-cms-block="storefront/product-info" data-attrs=""></div>

![Pastel Joy](images/07-pastel-joy.jpg)

Made with the same care as our wedding palettes but smaller and ready to deliver same-day. Powder blue delphinium, dusty pink lisianthus, butter yellow ranunculus and creamy stocks.

## What's in it

- Lisianthus
- Delphinium
- Ranunculus
- Stocks
- Garden roses

## Care

Mist the lisianthus daily — they prefer humidity.
